headline: FanDuel Parent Flutter Loses $30B In Market Capitalization: What Role Do Kalshi, Polymarket Play?
summary: Flutter (FLUT) lost $30 billion as Kalshi and Polymarket flanked FanDuel in prediction markets. Now FanDuel is loading $300 million into the comeback.
